regions.name: Reykjavík Capital Region
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit year-round for culture and museums, though summer offers the midnight sun and winter brings northern lights.

regions.name: South Coast
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from June to September for optimal weather and accessibility to waterfalls, glaciers, and black sand beaches.

regions.name: West
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit May to September for hiking and exploring fjords, though winter offers fewer tourists and dramatic scenery.

regions.name: Northwest
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit June to August for the best access to hiking and coastal scenery, with long daylight hours.

regions.name: North
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit June to August for whale watching and the midnight sun, or September to March for northern lights.

regions.name: Northeast
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit June to September for hiking and waterfalls, as winter roads can be challenging in this remote region.

regions.name: East
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit June to September to explore Vatnajökull glacier and eastern fjords without severe weather conditions.

regions.name: South Interior
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit July to August when mountain roads are open and weather is most stable in this remote highlands region.
